# Fixture: jonathon_attia_shift_emergency
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 31.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Partner: Wrong shift yall turned me away from
Concierge: I'm sorry to hear that, Jonathon. If a store manager turns you away from a shift, please report it as a turn-away in the app. You'll still receive turn-away pay for your time.
Partner: I did but it says the shift isn't there and I'm here it says started but won't let me do anything so the manager said to leave y'all better pay me
Concierge: Please submit a support ticket in the app. The team can investigate and ensure you get paid.
Partner: I did 4 times
Concierge: Since restarting the app isn't helping, please submit a support ticket in the app.
Partner: I did 4 times

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
I get it — that's frustrating. Email support@shiftsmart.com with the store name, date, time, and that the shift won't load. Mention your in-app tickets too. They'll process your turn-away pay.
